seo.title: Guides & Resources | Falls Prevention Downloads | Able Care
seo.description: Download our gated guides: HHVBP compliance, CCRC best practices, NICE 2025 alignment, and more.

blocks.headline: Guides and resources.
blocks.subtitle: Practical, evidence-based guides for healthcare organizations implementing standardized falls prevention. Each guide is designed for a specific use case and care setting.

blocks.heading: Available guides
blocks.body:
HHVBP Compliance Guide

A step-by-step guide for home health agencies looking to protect their HHVBP score with standardized falls screening. Covers measures, documentation, and OASIS-E integration.

CCRC Falls Prevention Guide

Best practices for implementing coordinated falls prevention across CCRCs and life plan communities. Covers IL, AL, and SNF settings with setting-specific protocols.

NICE 2025 Compliance Guide

Align your falls prevention program with the latest NICE 2025 recommendations. Covers updated clinical guidelines, assessment requirements, and documentation standards. Content to be developed.

Clinical Endpoint Brief

For researchers and clinical teams. Covers the Able Assess validation study methodology, clinical endpoints, and peer-reviewed evidence base. Content to be developed.

Referral Pitch Kit

For care coordinators and GPs making the case for standardized falls screening. Includes talking points, outcome data, and referral pathway templates. Content to be developed.

Protocol Library

Ready-to-implement screening protocols for common care settings. Includes workflow diagrams, staff checklists, and quality assurance templates. Content to be developed.

blocks.heading: Cannot find what you are looking for?
blocks.body: Our team can help you find the right resources for your organization and care setting.
